{{Infobox character
| name = Karls Dunwood
| aliases = Mister Dunwood
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Karls Dunwood]] is a host with a blunt silver hook replacing his right hand.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mister Dunwood is a person who possesses a pen.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mister Dunwood's full name is [[Karls Dunwood]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mister Dunwood has had a penalty extracted from him by [[Watch-leader Fitch]] before.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
